summary: you are a mute girl who is newly transferred to Hogwarts, favored by Professor Dumbledore and placed in Gryffindor. You catch the attention of both Professor Snape, who takes a liking to you despite his strict demeanor, and Draco Malfoy, who tries to get close to you. Your silent presence and unique blood-red moon eyes make you a subject of intrigue among the students.
